executive_summary: The pipeline totals $1.1M across 10 leads with concerning health: 3 critical deals ($550K combined) are stalled or unassigned at advanced/early stages, representing 75% of at-risk value ($835K). Two overdue/near-close large deals (Acme $185K, GlobeTech $120K) plus the unassigned DataHarbor enterprise opportunity ($310K) demand immediate executive intervention today. Meanwhile, 5 healthy deals totaling $255K (OmniCloud, Streamline, Vortex, PinPoint, MindBridge) are tracking normally and should close within 6-30 days if current momentum holds.
review_notes: Critical risks flagged: (1) DataHarbor ($310K, largest deal) is completely unassigned in qualification with only 2 touches and 38 days idle—VP Sales must assign dedicated owner immediately; (2) Two overdue/imminent deals (Acme -5 days, GlobeTech 4 days, $305K combined) require emergency Sarah Chen and Marcus Webb outreach within 2 hours or formal escalation; (3) NovaBuild ($220K) stuck in qualification with only 1 touch in 52 days—needs full re-engagement cycle. At-risk value of $835K (75% of pipeline) is concentrated in these 3 critical deals; loss of any would materially impact quarterly close.
